headline: Cardiovascular Exercise
description: Cardiovascular (aerobic) exercise strengthens the heart and lungs through sustained rhythmic movement using large muscle groups. ACSM recommends: 150 minutes moderate or 75 minutes vigorous aerobic activity weekly. Benefits: reduced cardiovascular disease risk, improved mood, better sleep, weight management, longevity.

citation.name: ACSM Guidelines for Exercise Testing and Prescription (11th Ed)
